A breakdown of how NOAIS reached its verdict

Score

– /100

Waiting for page analysis…

Breakdown

  • Vocabulary entropy –
  • Perplexity –
  • Burstiness –

How the score is calculated

NOAIS analyses every text node on the page and combines three signals into a single 0-100 score. Higher means more likely to be AI-generated.

Your privacy

NOAIS never makes a network call. The score, the breakdown, and your settings stay on this device.
